fortunes: You will narrowly escape death by water.
The one you fear will wear a disguise.
A joke will cost you a treasured possession.
Something blue will hurt you at dusk.
You will deceive someone in the marketplace using a ferret.
Follow the crow to find the way.
You will see a bridge collapse, but not completely.
A tear will be shed for you in an unexpected quarter.
A reptile will bring you three objects.
A fierce rain will interrupt a search for a gleaming object.
A wooden wheel will turn out to be made of stone.
A stray quail will bring hungry dogs.
You will spend two days in darkness, meeting no-one.
A feast will be prepared, but not eaten.
You will be ignored for 3 minutes by someone wearing a hat.
A child will deliver a message for you.
You will light a torch and then hear a terrible howling.
An axe will land in the throat next to yours.
A dark passageway will turn out to be a figment of your imagination.
Cold claws will seize you, and you will weep.
You will fall through ice, and into a wall.
You will be mistaken for a biscuit.
A calculation made in secret will be unreliable.
Three blades will meet in mid-air.
A boulder will tumble sidelong into a thief before your eyes.
One who is ill will be ill twice more.
A rope will snap as music plays.
An early breakfast will be interrupted by lava.
A horse and a fat man will appear simultaneously.
A crown will roll across a stone floor.
The weather will change your life, twice.
A red eye will go blind.
Careless treatment of livestock will lead to a quick death.
You will see a blind goat and a singing star.
A game of cards will lead to an erotic encounter.
A lock will prove unreliable.
A spherical object will make you laugh.
A fish will swim in a pearl-colored pool.
A night will take three days to pass.
An item of clothing will be revealed to be full of weevils.
A spider will speak to you after tasting marmalade.
You will be impaled on a summer evening.
A gold ring will roll between a pair of floorboards.
You will witness a murder in a quiet garden.
You will win a race by losing a meal.
You will find shelter in a carcass.
You will see a broken clock in a lonely tower.
You will be set on fire.
A foreigner will trust you immediately.
Drowning elves will beg you for mercy.
An ogre will mock your request.
You will touch a wild boar twice.
A plague will slay 10,000 bards and none will weep.
A prayer will be answered by the wrong god.
You will seize power through flattery, and lose it through gluttony.
You will gain a friend by performing a coin trick.
Your death will free seven prisoners.
You will see a statue crumble, and none will reassemble it.
An unshaven hermit will die to defend you.
A woman will be cruel to you three times, and kind once.
You will see a criminal die with fruit in his mouth.
Fog will obscure passage through a ruined port.
You will win the favor of a barbaric woman.
You will be given a massage by a strange man carrying a spoon.
You will be given a spoon by a strange man carrying a message.
You will be given a slow and searching look, and then be thrust through a door.
You will win a contest that you thought you’d lost.
You will be obeyed by one who mocks you.
The size of your nose will be discussed.
A window will shatter silently.
A stag will leave a trail of blood but none will notice it.
A poor man will be mistaken for a rich one, and a rich one will be mistaken for a woman.
A crude drawing will disturb you.
You will be separated from a companion, and be reunited by a malfunctioning device.
What remains of your family will be slain while you deliver a message.
An arrow will pierce your thigh and land in a useful place.
A child’s toy will turn out to have a sinister purpose.
You will enter a fortress hidden in a carpet.
You will successfully blackmail a man eating pheasant.
You will decapitate the wrong wizard.
You will be swallowed while you sleep.
You will be impersonated by a bald man.
A tower will crumble after you eat four meals inside.
One you hoped to surprise will be expecting you, and one you love will be on fire.
A key will be discovered in an enemy’s sock.
A tired man will offer to take you to the theatre.
You will have a terrible headache after shedding orcish blood.
You will learn a delicious recipe from a bearded woman.
You will forget to check the ceiling.
One you seek will be found in a closet.
You will receive credit for something you did by accident.
You will meet a beggar who resembles you in every way.
You will inspire fear in a man with one eye.
You will remember something important while drunk.
A gnome will offer to buy you shoes.
A jealous lover will give you a magnet.
A hideous creature will stumble on a bucket.
A tedious pedant will act as your translator.
An avalanche will ruin your evening.
You will find a clue in an earring just after losing a toe.
